title: [MTR/NTE] Boeing 737 MAX European Pack 2
description: European Livery Pack 2 For The RuMTR Boeing 737 MAX
body:
This is European Livery Pack 2 for the MTR Boeing 737 MAX. This pack requires [European Livery Pack 1](https://modrinth.com/project/737-max-mtr-european-pack-1) and the addons listed in the description.


The following Liveries have been included in this pack:

**Malta Air**

**Norwegian Airlines**

**Ryanair**

**Smartwings**

**Sun Express Airlines**

**TUI**

**Turkish Airlines**


If you have any questions or requests, feel free to contact me.

Hope You Enjoy!
